proposed_relations.description: Bus lane relocation on SB approach to Eastern Pkwy, part of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study proposed plan for St. Johns Pl. to Carroll St.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Relocates bus lane to SB approach • Provides more parking bet Pres. and Carroll Sts • Reduces bus delays on SB approach to Eastern Pkwy. • Net gain: 19 peak period parking spaces

decisions.rationale: Cited block p010_c0007 is on page 10 within the 'Proposed Improvement' section of the 'Proposed Plan: St. Johns Pl. to Carroll St.' presentation, which is part of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study project.
